prose:
Frontier orbital calculation on ethylene (C2H4, 6 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (PySCF RKS, tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, exact four-center integrals (no density fitting). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (single-point, not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed.

HOMO = −7.6155818 eV (index 7), LUMO = −0.17986527 eV (index 8). Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV (Koopmans orbital energy difference, not a true excitation energy). Total electronic energy = −78.623486 Hartree. 86 basis functions, 8 occupied orbitals. Output JSON: ethylene_frontier_dft.json.
